SERVICES |OFFER |CASE STUDIES (07) |TESTIMONIALS
We helped Lightdash raise $11M 🎉 -see case study →

First impressions matter more than ever

HAVING A GREAT IDEA ISN'T ENOUGH ANYMORE.

Today's users judge fast and scroll faster. We create
designs that stop them in their tracks through...

CONVERSION-FIRST DESIGN

Every pixel is strategically designed to turn visitors into customers. Our focus isn't just on the great looks, but on improving your KPIs.

DEDICATED FOCUS

We only take on 3 new clients per month. Why? Quality over quantity. Your project deserves our full attention, not whatever's left after juggling 20 others.

BEAUTIFUL ANIMATIONS

We use a powerful combination of Rive and no-code to engage your users with fluid animations that enhance the experience.

INDUSTRY EXPERIENCE

From MVP to IPO, we design success, convincing investors and crushing your competition. Your tech deserves the best treatment.

GROWTH-FOCUSED APPROACH

Our clients see an average 40% increase in conversions and have secured over $100M in funding after working with us.

RAPID PACE

We turn 'meh' into 'holy sh*t' in 90 days or less. Elevate your brand and user experience to match the quality of your technology.

WHAT WE DO

DESIGNME, IN A NUTSHELL.

If you're a startup founder or scaling your business, and any of this sounds familiar, we're a great fit to work together.

WHO WE WORK WITH:

AIAR/VRFintechSaaSEmerging tech
web3e-comBIReal estate

HOW FAST WE DO IT:

Brand sprints: 1-2 weeksMVPs: 1-3 months
Websites: 2-10 weeksDesign systems: 2-6 weeks
UX audits: 1-4 weeksRive animations: 1-4 weeks

Your search for a design
Partner ends here.

You're not here for another cookie-cutter design agency. You're here because you need a team that gets it. That's us.

At DesignMe, we're building more than interfaces. We're building the future of tech, one pixel at a time.

We're headquartered in Gdansk but our work is global.

A squad of 10+ battle-hardened designers, animators, developers,
UX strategists and managers spread across Poland, US, Iceland,
Ireland, and United Kingdom.
